prompt_text: Best internal tooling that works with PostgreSQL and Stripe
response:
# Best Internal Tooling for PostgreSQL + Stripe

## Admin Dashboards & Low-Code Platforms

### **Retool** (Top Choice)
- **Best for:** Quickly building internal tools without frontend code
- **Postgres:** Direct connectors, query builder, real-time sync
- **Stripe:** Pre-built Stripe integration (charges, customers, invoices)
- **Pricing:** Free tier available; $10-50/user/month
- **Why:** Fastest time-to-value, drag-and-drop interface

### **Budibase**
- Self-hosted or cloud option
- Open-source alternative to Retool
- Strong Postgres support, Stripe API integration
- Good for privacy-conscious teams

### **Airplane**
- Purpose-built for internal tools
- Lightweight, fast to deploy
- Integrates well with databases and APIs
- Good for task-based workflows

## Backend Frameworks (More Control)

### **Supabase** (PostgreSQL-first)
- Managed PostgreSQL with built-in APIs
- Real-time capabilities
- Row-level security (perfect for multi-tenant tools)
- Auth included; integrates with Stripe webhooks easily
- **Use case:** Full-stack internal tools with real-time updates

### **Wasp**
- Full-stack framework (React + Node.js + Postgres)
- Stripe integration built-in
- Minimal boilerplate
- Good for custom internal apps

## For Specific Use Cases

### **Billing/Revenue Operations**
- **Stripe Dashboard** (native) + **Metabase**
- **PostHog** (analytics + Stripe data)
- **dbt** + Postgres (transform Stripe data for reporting)

### **Customer/Revenue Analytics**
```
PostgreSQL (Stripe webhook events synced)
  ↓
dbt (transformations)
  ↓
Metabase/Superset (visualization)
```

### **Webhook Processing**
- **Trigger.dev** - Stripe webhook workflows with Postgres
- **n8n** - Self-hosted automation engine
- **Temporal** - Robust workflow orchestration

## Recommended Stack

**For most teams:**
```
Retool + PostgreSQL + Stripe API
+ Temporal/Bull (for async tasks)
+ dbt (for analytics)
```

**For more custom needs:**
```
Wasp/Next.js + Supabase + Stripe
+ PostHog (analytics)
+ Temporal (async jobs)
```

## Quick Feature Comparison

| Tool | Ease | Customization | Cost | Postgres | Stripe |
|------|------|---------------|------|----------|--------|
| Retool | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | Medium | $ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Supabase | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | High | $ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| Wasp | ⭐⭐⭐ | Very High | Free | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Budibase | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | High | $$ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |

**What's your primary use case?** (e.g., admin panel, billing dashboard, reporting) I can give more specific recommendations.
